subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-09 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: I wanted you to become acquainted with Baha'u'llah's latter Tablets and epistles. Know that, in the scriptures of every dispensation
subcodes.first_line_orig: من خواستم شما از الواح و رسائل اخیرهٴ حضرت بهآءالله مطلع شوید بدانید که در ایام ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @religion as source of love and unity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity in diversity, @contention and conflict
